sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48302" key="qeosofe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεοσοφ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n48302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have knowledge of things divine</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
